name: year splits with WHERE narrower than column year params
description: Regression test: when splits:['year'] is active and a WHERE clause targets a single year on a column whose params request a wider year range, the display join must bind to player_years.year (not to the WHERE's single year). Previously the WHERE's narrower year params leaked into group_column_params, collapsing the join to the single year and causing duplicate rows per player across split years.
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2020,2021,2022,2023,2024,2025]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR', 'TE')) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos" AS "pos_0", "player_seasonlogs"."espn_open_score" AS "espn_open_score_0", "player_seasonlogs"."espn_catch_score" AS "espn_catch_score_0", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_seasonlogs" on "player_seasonlogs"."pid" = "player"."pid" and player_seasonlogs.year = player_years.year and player_seasonlogs.year IN (2020,2021,2022,2023,2024,2025) and "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" = 'REG' where player.pos IN ('WR', 'TE') and player_seasonlogs.espn_open_score IS NOT NULL AND player_seasonlogs.espn_catch_score > '0' group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos", "player_seasonlogs"."espn_open_score", "player_seasonlogs"."espn_catch_score", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
